case_title: SAN FRANCISCO TRIAL LAWYERS ASSOCIATION VS. SHAWN KHORRAMI, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2015 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED NY CHRIS DOLAN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TRIAL LAWYERS ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO TRIAL LAWYERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHAWN KHORRAMI, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TRIAL LAWYERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAWN KHORRAMI, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED FEB-19-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAWN KHORRAMI, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
